case_title: IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION VS. PATRICIA MENA

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR ON JAN-21-2021 IN DEPT. 506 OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT CREDITOR IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION, IS PRESENT. GENER D. BENITEZ, VICE PRESIDENT IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR. PLAINTIFF PROVIDES A SPANISH INTERPERTER, JASMINE AGUIRRE, TO ASSIST JUDGMENT DEBTOR PATRICIA MENA. SC-133 IS COMPLETED BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR THROUGH THE ASSISTANCE OF JASMINE AGUIRRE, ACTING AS SPANISH INTERPERTER FOR JUDGMENT DEBTOR. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PATRICIA MENA IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTORS STATEMENT OF ASSETS IS REVIEWED BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR EXAMINES THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN COURT. EXAMINATION HEARING CONCLUDES AT 11:50 A.M. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
